title: SES Creative 00410 Dough - Unicorns neon Glitter - Fun Activity for Parents of Young Children, Age 3+
features: Make magical unicorns with SES Creative's Dough Unicorns Neon Glitter set, perfect for young artists.
Includes neon pink dough, glitter light-blue dough, unicorn molds, and glitter.
Made from safe, non-toxic materials, suitable for children aged 3 and up.
Encourages creativity and fine motor skills as kids create and decorate unicorns with dough.
Great for imaginative play and craft projects, keeping kids entertained with glittery dough.
description: From the manufacturer Dough - Unicorns neon glitter Make magical unicorns with dough with this set! The wooden figures can be used as cutters or as a handy base for a stunning unicorn. Use the tool supplied to create beautiful manes in hot pink, blue or glittery purple. Contents Neon pink play dough (90g) Glitter light-blue play dough (90g) Glitter purple play dough (90g) 4 Wooden cutters Plastic play dough syringe Containers are re-usable and they are without small parts Fun activity for parents of young children Gluten free, very soft and does not dry out while playing.
